overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dark dirt path through a grassy meadow at night, illuminated by a handheld torch. The footage appears to be from a survival or horror video game, ending with the camera approaching a deer standing in the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark grassy meadow with narrow dirt path

tall green grass flanking both sides of the path
dark silhouette of trees marking the horizon against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark night scene in a grassy meadow. The camera moves forward along a narrow dirt path, with tall grass visible on both sides and a distant tree line silhouetted against the sky. The path is illuminated by a warm torchlight cone.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow path with rocky outcrop

events.description: large boulder appears on the right side of the path, illuminated by the torch

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path with left arm holding torch now visible, illuminating a large rock formation on the right

entered.detail: large light-colored boulder or rock formation beside the path

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward with the torch-holding arm now visible on the left. A large rock formation comes into view on the right side of the path, passing from mid-distance to near the camera as the walk continues through the grassy field.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow path approaching forest edge

events.description: silhouette of a deer appears standing in the middle of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching a deer standing in the middle of the path, illuminated by the torchlight

notable_agents.action: deer standing still in the middle of the dirt path, facing the camera, illuminated by torchlight

segments.scene_description: Having passed the rock formation, the camera continues toward the tree line where a deer suddenly becomes visible standing in the path ahead. The deer remains stationary as the camera approaches, caught in the torchlight beam against the dark forest background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark dirt path through a grassy meadow that culminates in a sudden encounter with wildlife. It begins by moving forward through tall grass under a night sky, with a warm cone of torchlight illuminating the narrow trail toward a distant, silhouetted tree line. As the camera advances, the torch-holding arm becomes visible on the left while a large rock formation on the right shifts from the mid-distance to the immediate foreground. The scene then opens up as the camera passes the rocks and approaches the edge of the forest, where a stationary deer suddenly emerges in the path. The movement finally slows as the animal is caught in the direct beam of the torch against the backdrop of the dark woods.
